lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁੰਗੂ ਚੰਨਣੁ ਫੁਲ ਚੜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kungoo chanan ful charraae |
lines.english: You offer saffron, sandalwood and flowers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਜ ਕਰੇ ਰਖੈ ਨਾਵਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: pooj kare rakhai naavaal |
lines.english: You wash your stone gods and worship them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੈਰੀ ਪੈ ਪੈ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਮਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: pairee pai pai bahut manaae |
lines.english: Falling at their feet, you try so hard to appease them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੂਆ ਮੰਗਿ ਮੰਗਿ ਪੈਨੑੈ ਖਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: maanooaa mang mang painai khaae |
lines.english: Begging, begging from other people, you get things to wear and eat.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਾ ਝਗੜਾ ਅੰਧੀ ਸਥੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: andhaa jhagarraa andhee sathai |1|
lines.english: The blind assembly argues in blindness. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਖਿਆ ਦੇਇ ਨ ਮਰਦਿਆ ਰਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhukhiaa dee na maradiaa rakhai |
lines.english: Your idol does not feed the hungry, or save the dying.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧੀ ਕੰਮੀ ਅੰਧ ਸਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: andhee kamee andh sajaae |
lines.english: For your blind deeds, you will be blindly punished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਬੁਧੀ ਸੁਧਿ ਸਭਿ ਸਭਿ ਤੀਰਥ ਸਭਿ ਥਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe budhee sudh sabh sabh teerath sabh thaan |
lines.english: All intellect, all enlightenment, all sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਕਰਣੇ ਤਪ ਸਭਿ ਸਭੇ ਗੀਤ ਗਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe karane tap sabh sabhe geet giaan |
lines.english: All actions, all penances, all songs and spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਸੁਰਤੀ ਜੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਸਭੇ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe suratee jog sabh sabhe bed puraan |
lines.english: All intuitive understanding, all Yoga, all the Vedas and Puraanas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੀਆ ਅਮਰ ਸਭਿ ਸਭਿ ਖੁਸੀਆ ਸਭਿ ਖਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabh paatisaaheea amar sabh sabh khuseea sabh khaan |
lines.english: All kingdoms, all royal commands, all joys and all delicacies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਮਾਣਸ ਦੇਵ ਸਭਿ ਸਭੇ ਜੋਗ ਧਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe maanas dev sabh sabhe jog dhiaan |
lines.english: All mankind, all divinites, all Yoga and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਚਲਾਏ ਆਪਣੈ ਕਰਮੀ ਵਹੈ ਕਲਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: hukam chalaae aapanai karamee vahai kalaam |
lines.english: According to His Hukam, He commands them. His Pen writes out the account of their actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਖੰਡ ਸਭਿ ਸਭੇ ਜੀਅ ਜਹਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe pureea khandd sabh sabhe jeea jahaan |
lines.english: All worlds, all celestial realms; all the beings of the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਗਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai sukh aoopajai naame gat hoee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, peace wells up; the Name brings emancipation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਾ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਇ ਸਚੁ ਸਭਾ ਦੀਬਾਨੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sachaa sach naae sach sabhaa deebaan |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, True is the Lord, and True is His Name. True is His Congregation and His Court. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਭਵਜਲੁ ਲੰਘੀਐ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਿਘਨੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai bhavajal langheeai fir bighan na hoee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, one crosses over the terrifying world-ocean, and no obstructions are ever again encountered.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai pat paaeeai hiradai har soee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, honor is obtained. The Lord is enshrined in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਨਾਉ ਮੰਨੀਐ ਜਿਨ ਦੇਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur miliai naau maneeai jin devai soee |9|
lines.english: O Nanak, meeting with the True Guru, one comes to have faith in the Name; he alone has faith, who is blessed with it. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਪੰਥੁ ਪਰਗਟਾ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਭ ਲੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai panth paragattaa naame sabh loee |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, the Path is revealed; through the Name, one is totally enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਰੀਆ ਖੰਡਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਇਕ ਪੈਰਿ ਧਿਆਏ ॥
lines.translit: pureea khanddaa sir kare ik pair dhiaae |
lines.english: The mortal walks on his head through the worlds and realms; he meditates, balanced on one foot.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉਣੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਜਪੁ ਕਰੇ ਸਿਰੁ ਮੁੰਡੀ ਤਲੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: paun maar man jap kare sir munddee talai dee |
lines.english: Controlling the wind of the breath, he meditates within his mind, tucking his chin down into his chest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਉਪਰਿ ਓਹੁ ਟਿਕ ਟਿਕੈ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਜੋਰੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kis upar ohu ttik ttikai kis no jor karee |
lines.english: What does he lean on? Where does he get his power?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਹੀਐ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਕਰਤਾ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kis no kaheeai naanakaa kis no karataa dee |
lines.english: What can be said, O Nanak? Who is blessed by the Creator?

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੈ ਹੈ ਆਖਾਂ ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟੀ ਹੂ ਕੋਟਿ ਕੋਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: hai hai aakhaan kott kott kottee hoo kott kott |
lines.english: He is, He is - I say it millions upon millions, millions upon millions of times.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਹਾਏ ਆਪਣੈ ਮੂਰਖੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਣੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hukam rahaae aapanai moorakh aap ganee |1|
lines.english: God keeps all under His Command, but the fool shows off himself. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖੂੰ ਆਖਾਂ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਕਹਣਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਤੋਟਿ ॥
lines.translit: aakhoon aakhaan sadaa sadaa kehan na aavai tott |
lines.english: With my mouth I say it, forever and ever; there is no end to this speech.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਹਉ ਥਕਾਂ ਨ ਠਾਕੀਆ ਏਵਡ ਰਖਹਿ ਜੋਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa hau thakaan na tthaakeea evadd rakheh jot |
lines.english: I do not get tired, and I will not be stopped; this is how great my determination is.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚਸਿਅਹੁ ਚੁਖ ਬਿੰਦ ਉਪਰਿ ਆਖਣੁ ਦੋਸੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak chasiahu chukh bind upar aakhan dos |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, this is tiny and insignificant. To say that it is more, is wrong. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਕੁਲੁ ਉਧਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਸਬਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai kul udharai sabh kuttanb sabaaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, all one's ancestors and family are saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਉਧਰੈ ਜਿਨ ਰਿਦੈ ਵਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai sangat udharai jin ridai vasaaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, one's associates are saved; enshrine it within your heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਸੁਣਿ ਉਧਰੇ ਜਿਨ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai sun udhare jin rasan rasaaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, those who hear it are saved; let your tongue delight in it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਤਿਨੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿਆ ਜਿਨ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: naanak naam tinee saalaahiaa jin guroo milaaeaa |10|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone Praise the Name, who meet with the Guru. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਮੰਨਿਐ ਦੁਖ ਭੁਖ ਗਈ ਜਿਨ ਨਾਮਿ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naae maniai dukh bhukh gee jin naam chit laaeaa |
lines.english: With faith in the Name, pain and hunger are dispelled; let your consciousness be attached to the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਰੁਤੀ ਮਾਹ ਸਭਿ ਸਭਿ ਧਰਤਂ‍ੀ ਸਭਿ ਭਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe rutee maah sabh sabh dharatanee sabh bhaar |
lines.english: All seasons, all months, all the earth and everything on it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਭਿ ਦਿਹ ਸਭਿ ਥਿਤੀ ਸਭਿ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe raatee sabh dih sabh thitee sabh vaar |
lines.english: All nights, all days, all dates, all days of the week;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਖੰਡ ਸਭਿ ਸਭਿ ਲੋਅ ਲੋਅ ਆਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe pureea khandd sabh sabh loa loa aakaar |
lines.english: All solar systems and galaxies, all worlds, people and forms.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਪਾਣੀ ਪਉਣ ਸਭਿ ਸਭਿ ਅਗਨੀ ਪਾਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sabhe paanee paun sabh sabh aganee paataal |
lines.english: All waters, all winds, all fires and underworlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਹਿ ਥਕਹਿ ਆਖਿ ਆਖਿ ਕਰਿ ਸਿਫਤਂ‍ੀ ਵੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: aakheh thakeh aakh aakh kar sifatanee veechaar |
lines.english: Mortals may utter, chant, recite and contemplate His Praises until they grow weary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਜਾਪੀ ਕੇਤੜਾ ਕਹਿ ਨ ਸਕੀਜੈ ਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: hukam na jaapee ketarraa keh na sakeejai kaar |
lines.english: No one knows how great the Hukam of His Command is; no one can describe His actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਖਂ‍ੀ ਪਰਣੈ ਜੇ ਫਿਰਾਂ ਦੇਖਾਂ ਸਭੁ ਆਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: akhanee paranai je firaan dekhaan sabh aakaar |
lines.english: If I were to walk around with my eyes wide open, gazing at all the created forms;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਛਾ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਪੰਡਿਤਾਂ ਪੁਛਾ ਬੇਦ ਬੀਚਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: puchhaa giaanee pandditaan puchhaa bed beechaar |
lines.english: I could ask the spiritual teachers and religious scholars, and those who contemplate the Vedas;

lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਬਪੁੜੀ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਕਹੈ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: trin na paaeo bapurree naanak kahai gavaar |1|
lines.english: The poor fools, O Nanak, cannot find even a tiny bit of the Lord. ||1||
